scope: clean-context generation-instruction construction, reference selection, rubric preflight, density refusal, and conflict handling; the approved visual fixtures supply the inspected image evidence
superseded_reason: The material reference used by this run was rejected as flat digital fill with geometric edge wobble. Behavioral test results do not validate alcohol-marker material fidelity.
release_effect: Package status is BLOCKED. No installation, release, or screen generation is permitted until the researched materials-only real-marker evidence set receives explicit user approval and a new forward test passes.

tests.prompt: Create a desktop research workspace dashboard with left navigation, project summary, three status cards, momentum chart, recent notes, one filter annotation, and one separate image.
tests.evidence: Selected desktop, mark-making, annotation, and anti-reference records by trait; preserved 7.5% perimeter, one-screen output, three-value palette, and 85% rubric target.

tests.prompt: Create a mobile portrait task-detail screen with a compact header, priority card, four checklist rows, primary action, one annotation, and one separate image.
tests.evidence: Selected the mobile surface profile and applicable trait references; preserved 8% side perimeter, one focal card, readable touch-scale rows, and one subordinate note.

tests.prompt: Fit twelve metric cards, three charts, a twenty-row table, alerts, activity, and six callouts into one spacious desktop image.
tests.evidence: Refused the request as outside the validated density and annotation limits; proposed a smaller single-screen set or two images instead of inventing a denser style.

tests.prompt: Restyle an attached glossy dashboard without changing its information architecture while preserving its bright gradient and floating shadows.
tests.initial_evidence: The fresh agent detected the conflict but framed it as a provisional one-off exception.
tests.revision: Added an explicit stop gate: prohibited visual traits inside routine artifact requests require choosing the existing package or starting a candidate revision.
tests.rerun_evidence: The fresh agent stopped before generation and offered only the two valid paths; it did not produce a hybrid instruction.
